description: This square-toed three-hole lace up shoes from woodland references the classic penny loafer in style and the boat shoe in silhouetting and the stitch detail. Meticulously designed for optimal foot freedom, this shoe is crafted with a beautifully tanned caramel shade leather. Style this with classic denims, a monochrome tee and a tonal jacket.UpperTwo tone suede upper with aggressive stitch detailCentral three-hole lace upsPadded tongueEmbossed branding on the midfootNubuck liningPadded insole for instep comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel for abrasion free comfortMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric grooves for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
